title: AgentOffer Offer Schema v0.2
description: Formal Offer Schema v0.2 with conversion goals and card display fields.

offer_id.description: Stable inventory-level offer identifier. UUIDv7 is recommended. Same offer_id across multiple query responses for the same offer.

offer_instance_id.description: Per-dispatch unique identifier. UUIDv7 is recommended. Generated fresh for each query response. Used as the dispatch-level fallback key for click → conversion → settlement attribution. Carried in landing-page URL query param ?aon_tracking_id={offer_instance_id} and S2S postback body aon_tracking_id={offer_instance_id}. Per-click attribution uses a distinct redirect-time click ID exposed through the {CLICK_ID} macro or aon_click_id fallback query parameter. Industry alignment with Google Ads gclid / Meta fbclid / TikTok ttclid integration-layer pattern.

content_language.description: BCP 47 language tag for the user-facing content in this Offer payload, such as title, description, and action copy. This is content metadata and does not affect targeting or eligibility.

offer_info.description: Core descriptive, categorical, and commercial information for the offer.

offer_type.description: Optional offer fulfillment form — how the offer is delivered to the end user. This is a fulfillment hint, not the primary classification. Orthogonal to offer_info.category.id and secondary_category_ids.

category.description: AON Taxonomy v1 category reference. `id` is a stable generated dot-path category id from the taxonomy registry.

id.description: Stable AON Taxonomy v1 category id. Registry membership is validated by the taxonomy drift guard.

secondary_category_ids.description: Optional auxiliary AON Taxonomy v1 category ids for offers that have additional taxonomy meanings beyond the primary offer_info.category.id. These ids participate in AON-owned category matching and safety filtering, but they do not replace the primary category. Each secondary id must be from a different taxonomy branch than the primary category and the other secondary ids; do not repeat an ancestor or descendant relationship.

description.description: Core semantic description for agent understanding and end-user display.

tags.description: Partner-supplied content matching tags. These tags are optional semantic hints and do not replace offer_info.category.id, targeting rules, query filters, compliance policy, or guaranteed end-user display.

rating.description: Optional user-facing aggregate rating for the offer or merchant-provided offer content. This is a display rating, not an internal ranking score.

value.description: Rating value on a 0 to 5 display scale.

count.description: Optional number of ratings represented by the aggregate value.

source.description: Optional open-text rating source. Empty string is allowed; missing source is not materialized to a default.

properties.description: Optional ordered display properties for card highlights. These are structured offer properties, distinct from offer_info.tags matching hints.

type.description: Open semantic property key. The schema validates format only; recommended property types may be documented separately but are not a closed enum.

value.description: Structured property value. String values are limited to 100 Unicode code points.

unit.description: Optional open unit string used with value, such as %, USD, days, or months.

display_pattern.description: Optional plain-text display template. This is not an enum and only exact same-item placeholders ${type}, ${value}, and ${unit} are valid after semantic validation.

recommendation_reason.description: Partner-provided user-readable recommendation reason. Consumers may choose to display this text; it must not contain internal conversion metrics or operational-only notes.

amount.description: Decimal string representing the consumer-facing price amount.

unit.description: Optional pricing unit. Missing unit is interpreted as one_time for display semantics but must not be materialized during round-trip.

fulfillment_note.description: Optional display-ready transaction or fulfillment note, such as cancellation, shipping, payment, or eligibility conditions.

start_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for when the offer becomes active.

expire_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for when the offer expires.

priority.description: Exposure priority. Higher values take precedence.

material.description: Creative assets associated with the offer.

tag.description: Asset purpose tag such as logo, banner, hero, thumbnail.

alt_text.description: Optional accessible replacement text for this creative asset. It describes the asset content for assistive technologies, loading fallback, and localization; it is not a visible caption or promotional highlight.

conversion_rule.description: Rules for valid conversion events, attribution logic, and tracking windows. RECOMMENDED: SHOULD be present to establish clear attribution expectations.

click_window_hours.description: Click attribution window in hours. Conversions within this window after a click are eligible for attribution.

view_window_hours.description: View-through attribution window in hours. Default 0 (view-through attribution not supported).

attribution_model.description: Attribution method. last_click: credit goes to the last click before conversion. first_click: credit goes to the first click. linear is reserved for future use.

dedup_strategy.description: Deduplication strategy for multiple conversions from the same user. first: only the first conversion counts. all: every conversion counts. highest: only the highest-value conversion counts.

minimum_amount.description: Minimum conversion amount, decimal string. Conversions below this threshold do not qualify for goal recognition.

extra.description: Offer-level open extension metadata. This is part of the Offer payload and is distinct from any API response envelope extra field.

entity.description: Business entity associated with the offer.

type.description: Entity classification. business: registered commercial entity, individual: personal operator, institution: public/non-profit organization.

logo.description: Canonical merchant/entity logo for identity display. This is distinct from offer creative assets in material[].

url.description: Stable public HTTP(S) URL of the entity logo image.

alt_text.description: Accessible text for the logo. Consumers may fall back to entity.name when absent.

action.description: Primary executable action exposed by the offer. Payload structure is constrained by type.

consumer_action.description: Main end-user action semantic for CTA fallback and consumer-owned analytics. This does not replace action.name, action.type, action.destination_types, action.payload.target, or conversion_rule.

description.description: Explanation of the action intent or destination.

destination_types.description: Destination target-shape hints for UI/display. This field does not replace action.type or action.payload.target and does not express click URL priority.

target.description: Destination URL or deep link URI.
Deep link URI for the app.

fallback_url.description: Fallback URL when app is not installed.

oneOf.description: Empty include means the location dimension is unconstrained.

location_id.description: AON Location Registry v1 location id, sourced from Google Geo Target Criteria ID.

oneOf.description: Included AON Location Registry v1 locations.

include.description: Included geographic locations. Use either legacy country strings or structured location_id objects, not both in the same array.

oneOf.description: Empty exclude means no location is excluded.

location_id.description: AON Location Registry v1 location id, sourced from Google Geo Target Criteria ID.

oneOf.description: Excluded AON Location Registry v1 locations.

exclude.description: Excluded geographic locations. Exclude wins over include.

min_age.description: Minimum verified viewer age required for this targeting rule.
